tasks.title: Phase 1: Add Redis to docker-compose + update env templates
acceptance: depends_on: redis on ai-service and ops-api
REDIS_URL in ai-service and ops-api env templates

tasks.title: Phase 2: Create shared schemas (Pydantic models for events)
acceptance: All models use BaseModel with field descriptions

tasks.title: Phase 3: Build ai-service (Python, FastAPI, Redis consumer, mock ML)
acceptance: requirements.txt with redis, fastapi, uvicorn, pydantic
Health check in Dockerfile or docker-compose

tasks.title: Phase 4: Build ops-api (FastAPI, Redis consumer, REST + WebSocket)
acceptance: Redis consumer reading both core-platform and ai-service streams
WebSocket endpoint at /ws for live dashboard updates

tasks.title: Phase 5: Build core-platform Dockerfile (real C++ build)
acceptance: Outputs to Redis via publish_to_redis.py publisher

tasks.title: Phase 6: Build ops-frontend (React dashboard)
acceptance: WebSocket connection to ops-api for live updates
nginx.conf with runtime resolver for upstreams

tasks.title: Phase 7: Wire full stack + end-to-end validation
acceptance: docker compose build succeeds for all services
docker compose up starts all containers
ops-api serves REST, WebSocket, and auth
All 7 containers healthy (redis, postgres, core-platform, ai-service, ops-api, ai-agent, ops-frontend)
